question_pt: Quais poços foram perfurados no Bloco BM-S-11?
question_en: Which wells were drilled in Block BM-S-11?
cypher: MATCH (p:Operational {id: 'poco'})-[:drilled_in]->(b:Operational {id: 'bloco'}) WHERE b.example CONTAINS 'BM-S-11' RETURN p.label AS poco, p.id AS id

question_pt: Qual é a definição de PAD no contexto ANP?
question_en: What is the definition of PAD in the ANP context?
cypher: MATCH (n:Contractual {id: 'pad'}) RETURN n.label AS termo, n.definition AS definicao, n.legal_source AS fonte_legal

question_pt: Quais entidades estão ligadas ao Contrato E&P?
question_en: Which entities are linked to the E&P Contract?
cypher: MATCH (c:Contractual {id: 'contrato-ep'})-[r]->(n) RETURN c.label AS contrato, type(r) AS relacao, n.label AS entidade_relacionada, n.id AS id_entidade

question_pt: Qual o regime contratual definido pelo Contrato E&P?
question_en: What contractual regime is defined by the E&P Contract?
cypher: MATCH (c:Contractual {id: 'contrato-ep'})-[:defines]->(r:Instrument {id: 'regime-contratual'}) RETURN c.label AS contrato, r.label AS regime, r.definition AS definicao

question_pt: Quais são os tipos de entidades do grafo e quantas há em cada tipo?
question_en: What are the entity types in the graph and how many are there per type?
cypher: MATCH (n) RETURN n.type AS tipo, count(n) AS quantidade ORDER BY quantidade DESC

question_pt: Qual é a cadeia completa de um poço até o campo que ele pode originar?
question_en: What is the full chain from a well to the field it can originate?
cypher: MATCH (p:Operational {id: 'poco'})-[:may_register]->(nd:Instrument {id: 'notificacao-descoberta'}), (b:Contractual {id: 'pad'})-[:may_yield]->(dc:Contractual {id: 'declaracao-comercialidade'})-[:originates]->(campo:Operational {id: 'campo'}) RETURN p.label AS poco, nd.label AS notificacao, dc.label AS declaracao, campo.label AS campo

question_pt: Qual a diferença entre Reserva e Recurso no grafo?
question_en: What is the difference between Reserve and Resource in the graph?
cypher: MATCH (rv:Contractual {id: 'reserva'})-[:derived_from]->(rc:Contractual {id: 'recurso'}) RETURN rv.label AS reserva, rv.definition AS def_reserva, rc.label AS recurso, rc.definition AS def_recurso

question_pt: Quais equipamentos de fundo de poço estão relacionados ao nó Poço?
question_en: Which downhole equipment nodes are related to the Well node?
cypher: MATCH (eq:Equipment)-[r]->(p:Operational {id: 'poco'}) RETURN eq.label AS equipamento, eq.id AS id, type(r) AS relacao

question_pt: Quais entidades do tipo geological estão no grafo?
question_en: Which geological entities exist in the graph?
cypher: MATCH (n:Geological) RETURN n.label AS nome, n.id AS id, n.definition AS definicao ORDER BY n.label

question_pt: Como a ANP se relaciona com o SIGEP e a SEP?
question_en: How is ANP related to SIGEP and SEP?
cypher: MATCH (a:Actor {id: 'anp'})-[r]->(n) WHERE n.id IN ['sigep', 'sep'] RETURN a.label AS anp, type(r) AS relacao, n.label AS sistema, n.definition AS descricao

question_pt: Qual é o caminho de um Bloco até o Campo que ele pode gerar (multi-hop)?
question_en: What is the multi-hop path from a Block to the Field it can generate?
cypher: MATCH path = (b:Operational {id: 'bloco'})-[:may_have]->(pad:Contractual {id: 'pad'})-[:may_yield]->(dc:Contractual {id: 'declaracao-comercialidade'})-[:originates]->(c:Operational {id: 'campo'}) RETURN [node IN nodes(path) | node.label] AS cadeia_conceitual

question_pt: Quais entidades do tipo actor existem e quais são suas definições?
question_en: Which actor entities exist and what are their definitions?
cypher: MATCH (a:Actor) RETURN a.label AS ator, a.id AS id, a.definition AS definicao ORDER BY a.label

question_pt: O que é um Período Exploratório? Distinga de exploração genérica.
question_en: What is an Exploratory Period? Distinguish it from generic exploration.
cypher: MATCH (pe:Instrument {id: 'periodo-exploratorio'}) RETURN pe.label AS periodo_exploratorio, pe.definition AS definicao, pe.legal_source AS fonte_legal, pe.synonyms_pt AS sinonimos_pt

question_pt: Qual a relação entre a Formação Geológica e o Reservatório?
question_en: What is the relationship between Geological Formation and Reservoir?
cypher: MATCH (r:Operational {id: 'reservatorio'})-[:hosted_in]->(f:Geological {id: 'formacao'}) RETURN r.label AS reservatorio, f.label AS formacao, f.definition AS def_formacao

question_pt: Como o FPSO se conecta ao Campo e à ANM (Árvore de Natal Molhada)?
question_en: How does an FPSO connect to the Field and to the ANM (Wet Christmas Tree)?
cypher: MATCH (fpso:Equipment {id: 'fpso'})-[r1]->(c:Operational {id: 'campo'}), (riser:Equipment {id: 'riser'})-[r2]->(anm:Equipment {id: 'anm-eq'}), (riser)-[r3]->(fpso) RETURN fpso.label AS fpso, type(r1) AS rel_fpso_campo, riser.label AS riser, type(r2) AS rel_riser_anm, anm.label AS anm

question_pt: Quantas relações saem de cada entidade do tipo contractual?
question_en: How many outgoing relationships does each contractual entity have?
cypher: MATCH (c:Contractual)-[r]->() RETURN c.label AS entidade, c.id AS id, count(r) AS total_relacoes ORDER BY total_relacoes DESC

question_pt: Qual a diferença entre Concessão e Partilha de Produção no grafo?
question_en: What is the difference between Concession and Production Sharing in the graph?
cypher: MATCH (rc:Instrument {id: 'regime-contratual'}) RETURN rc.label AS regime_contratual, rc.definition AS definicao, rc.synonyms_pt AS sinonimos_pt, rc.legal_source AS base_legal

question_pt: Quais entidades analíticas existem no grafo e quais são suas relações?
question_en: Which analytical entities exist in the graph and what are their relationships?
cypher: MATCH (a:Analytical)-[r]->(n) RETURN a.label AS entidade_analitica, a.id AS id, type(r) AS relacao, n.label AS alvo ORDER BY a.label

question_pt: Como a Rocha Geradora se relaciona com o Sistema Petrolífero?
question_en: How does the Source Rock relate to the Petroleum System?
cypher: MATCH (rg:Geological {id: 'rocha-geradora'})-[:feeds]->(sp:Geological {id: 'sistema-petrolifero'})-[:integrates_to]->(bs:Operational {id: 'bacia-sedimentar'}) RETURN rg.label AS rocha_geradora, sp.label AS sistema_petrolifero, bs.label AS bacia

question_pt: Qual a cadeia completa do play até a reserva? (multi-hop geológico-comercial)
question_en: What is the full chain from play to reserve? (multi-hop geological-commercial)
cypher: MATCH path = (pl:Operational {id: 'play'})-[:spawns]->(pr:Operational {id: 'prospecto'})-[:becomes]->(ac:Operational {id: 'acumulacao'})-[:becomes]->(c:Operational {id: 'campo'})-[:declares]->(rv:Contractual {id: 'reserva'})-[:derived_from]->(rc:Contractual {id: 'recurso'}) RETURN [node IN nodes(path) | node.label] AS cadeia_geologica_comercial

question_pt: Quais entidades têm cobertura na camada layer1 (BFO+GeoCore)?
question_en: Which entities have coverage in layer1 (BFO+GeoCore)?
cypher: MATCH (n) WHERE 'layer1' IN n.geocoverage RETURN n.label AS entidade, n.id AS id, n.type AS tipo ORDER BY n.type, n.label

question_pt: Qual o caminho de um Poço até a Bacia Sedimentar passando pelo Bloco?
question_en: What is the path from a Well to a Sedimentary Basin going through the Block?
cypher: MATCH (p:Operational {id: 'poco'})-[:drilled_in]->(b:Operational {id: 'bloco'})-[:delimited_in]->(bs:Operational {id: 'bacia-sedimentar'}) RETURN p.label AS poco, b.label AS bloco, bs.label AS bacia

question_pt: O que é o PAD? É o mesmo que 'drilling pad'?
question_en: What is PAD? Is it the same as 'drilling pad'?
cypher: MATCH (pad:Contractual {id: 'pad'}) RETURN pad.label AS nome, pad.definition AS definicao_pt, pad.label_en AS nome_en, pad.legal_source AS base_legal

question_pt: Quais entidades possuem o campo osdu_kind definido?
question_en: Which entities have the osdu_kind field defined?
cypher: MATCH (n) WHERE n.osdu_kind IS NOT NULL RETURN n.label AS entidade, n.id AS id, n.osdu_kind AS osdu_kind ORDER BY n.label

question_pt: Quais entidades operacionais têm relação com o ambiente (onshore/offshore)?
question_en: Which operational entities are related to the environment (onshore/offshore) classification?
cypher: MATCH (n:Operational)-[:classified_by]->(a:Geological {id: 'ambiente'}) RETURN n.label AS entidade, n.id AS id, a.label AS classificador ORDER BY n.label

question_pt: Qual é o caminho completo de Poço até Regime Contratual (multi-hop 4 saltos)?
question_en: What is the full path from Well to Contractual Regime (4-hop multi-hop)?
cypher: MATCH (p:Operational {id: 'poco'})-[:drilled_in]->(b:Operational {id: 'bloco'})-[:governed_by]->(c:Contractual {id: 'contrato-ep'})-[:defines]->(rc:Instrument {id: 'regime-contratual'}) RETURN p.label AS poco, b.label AS bloco, c.label AS contrato, rc.label AS regime

question_pt: Quais entidades têm petrokgraph_uri definido e quais suas URIs?
question_en: Which entities have a petrokgraph_uri defined and what are their URIs?
cypher: MATCH (n) WHERE n.petrokgraph_uri IS NOT NULL RETURN n.label AS entidade, n.id AS id, n.type AS tipo, n.petrokgraph_uri AS uri ORDER BY n.type, n.label

question_pt: Como a Trapa se relaciona com a Falha e com a Acumulação?
question_en: How is Trap related to Fault and Accumulation?
cypher: MATCH (f:Geological {id: 'falha'})-[:forms]->(t:Geological {id: 'trapa'})-[:contains]->(ac:Operational {id: 'acumulacao'}) RETURN f.label AS falha, t.label AS trapa, ac.label AS acumulacao

question_pt: Quais entidades do grafo têm datasets ANP/SIGEP associados?
question_en: Which graph entities have ANP/SIGEP datasets associated?
cypher: MATCH (n) WHERE size(n.datasets) > 0 RETURN n.label AS entidade, n.id AS id, n.datasets AS datasets ORDER BY n.label

question_pt: Qual a diferença semântica entre Campo (ANP), Bloco e Bacia Sedimentar?
question_en: What is the semantic difference between Field (ANP), Block, and Sedimentary Basin?
cypher: MATCH (n) WHERE n.id IN ['campo', 'bloco', 'bacia-sedimentar'] RETURN n.label AS termo, n.id AS id, n.definition AS definicao, n.legal_source AS base_legal ORDER BY n.id

question_pt: Quais são as entidades de instrumento no grafo e suas definições?
question_en: What are the instrument entities in the graph and their definitions?
cypher: MATCH (n:Instrument) RETURN n.label AS instrumento, n.id AS id, n.definition AS definicao ORDER BY n.label

question_pt: Como a Amostra de Fluido se conecta ao PVT e à classificação do fluido?
question_en: How does a Fluid Sample connect to PVT and fluid classification?
cypher: MATCH (af:Analytical {id: 'amostra-fluido'})-[:undergoes]->(pvt:Analytical {id: 'pvt'})-[:classifies]->(cf:Analytical {id: 'classe-fluido'}) RETURN af.label AS amostra_fluido, pvt.label AS pvt, cf.label AS classe_fluido

question_pt: Quais entidades têm mais de 3 relações de saída no grafo?
question_en: Which entities have more than 3 outgoing relationships in the graph?
cypher: MATCH (n)-[r]->() WITH n, count(r) AS grau WHERE grau > 3 RETURN n.label AS entidade, n.id AS id, n.type AS tipo, grau ORDER BY grau DESC

question_pt: Qual a relação entre Wellbore, Completação e DHSV?
question_en: What is the relationship between Wellbore, Completion, and DHSV?
cypher: MATCH (wb:Operational {id: 'wellbore'})-[:has_completion]->(comp:Operational {id: 'completacao'})-[:contains]->(dhsv:Equipment {id: 'dhsv'}) RETURN wb.label AS wellbore, comp.label AS completacao, dhsv.label AS dhsv

question_pt: Qual entidade representa a sigla UTS e qual é sua definição correta (não é Unidade Territorial)?
question_en: Which entity represents the acronym UTS and what is its correct definition (not Territorial Unit)?
cypher: MATCH (u:Instrument {id: 'uts'}) RETURN u.label AS uts, u.definition AS definicao, u.legal_source AS base_legal

question_pt: Quais entidades têm cobertura semântica tanto na layer3 (Petro KGraph) quanto na layer4 (OSDU)?
question_en: Which entities have semantic coverage in both layer3 (Petro KGraph) and layer4 (OSDU)?
cypher: MATCH (n) WHERE 'layer3' IN n.geocoverage AND 'layer4' IN n.geocoverage RETURN n.label AS entidade, n.id AS id, n.type AS tipo, n.petrokgraph_uri AS uri_kg, n.osdu_kind AS osdu_kind ORDER BY n.type

question_pt: Como o IBAMA se relaciona com o Operador e os estudos ambientais?
question_en: How does IBAMA relate to the Operator and environmental studies?
cypher: MATCH (ibama:Actor {id: 'ibama'})-[r]->(n) RETURN ibama.label AS ibama, type(r) AS relacao, n.label AS entidade, n.id AS id ORDER BY type(r)

question_pt: Qual é a cadeia Poço -> Bloco -> Bacia -> Regime Contratual com labels de relação?
question_en: What is the Well -> Block -> Basin -> Contractual Regime chain with relation labels?
cypher: MATCH (p:Operational {id: 'poco'})-[r1:drilled_in]->(b:Operational {id: 'bloco'})-[r2:delimited_in]->(bs:Operational {id: 'bacia-sedimentar'}), (b)-[r3:governed_by]->(c:Contractual {id: 'contrato-ep'})-[r4:defines]->(rc:Instrument {id: 'regime-contratual'}) RETURN p.label AS poco, r1.label_pt AS rel1, b.label AS bloco, r2.label_pt AS rel2, bs.label AS bacia, r3.label_pt AS rel3, c.label AS contrato, r4.label_pt AS rel4, rc.label AS regime

question_pt: Quais entidades possuem sinônimos em português registrados?
question_en: Which entities have registered Portuguese synonyms?
cypher: MATCH (n) WHERE size(n.synonyms_pt) > 0 RETURN n.label AS entidade, n.id AS id, n.type AS tipo, n.synonyms_pt AS sinonimos ORDER BY n.label

question_pt: Qual a diferença entre Reserva (SPE-PRMS) e Reserva Ambiental? (Polissemia crítica)
question_en: What is the difference between Reserve (SPE-PRMS) and Environmental Reserve? (Critical polysemy)
cypher: MATCH (rv:Contractual {id: 'reserva'}) RETURN rv.label AS reserva_spe_prms, rv.definition AS definicao, rv.synonyms_pt AS sinonimos_pt, rv.legal_source AS base_legal

question_pt: Qual o caminho da Rodada de Licitação até o Primeiro Óleo?
question_en: What is the path from Bidding Round to First Oil?
cypher: MATCH path = (rl:Contractual {id: 'rodada-licitacao'})<-[:originated_in]-(b:Operational {id: 'bloco'})-[:may_have]->(pad:Contractual {id: 'pad'})-[:may_yield]->(dc:Contractual {id: 'declaracao-comercialidade'})-[:initiates]->(ad:Contractual {id: 'area-desenvolvimento'})-[:ends_with]->(po:Operational {id: 'primeiro-oleo'}) RETURN [node IN nodes(path) | node.label] AS cadeia_licitacao_a_oleo

question_pt: Quais entidades têm exemplos reais (ex: poço 1-RJS-702-RJ, bloco BM-S-11)?
question_en: Which entities have real-world examples (e.g. well 1-RJS-702-RJ, block BM-S-11)?
cypher: MATCH (n) WHERE size(n.examples) > 0 RETURN n.label AS entidade, n.id AS id, n.examples AS exemplos ORDER BY n.label

question_pt: Como o GC-MS se relaciona com o Biomarcador e a Correlação Óleo-Rocha?
question_en: How does GC-MS relate to Biomarker and Oil-Source Correlation?
cypher: MATCH (gc:Analytical {id: 'gc-ms'})-[:detects]->(bm:Analytical {id: 'biomarcador'})-[:enables]->(cor:Analytical {id: 'correlacao-oleo-rocha'}) RETURN gc.label AS gc_ms, bm.label AS biomarcador, cor.label AS correlacao_oleo_rocha

question_pt: Qual a relação entre Campo Tensional, Janela de Lama e Poço (geomecânica)?
question_en: What is the relationship between Stress Field, Mud Window, and Well (geomechanics)?
cypher: MATCH (ct:Analytical {id: 'campo-tensional'})-[:defines]->(jl:Analytical {id: 'janela-lama'})-[:guides_drilling_of]->(p:Operational {id: 'poco'}) RETURN ct.label AS campo_tensional, jl.label AS janela_lama, p.label AS poco

question_pt: Quais entidades representam conceitos exclusivamente brasileiros (camada ANP)?
question_en: Which entities represent exclusively Brazilian concepts (ANP layer)?
cypher: MATCH (n) WHERE n.legal_source CONTAINS 'ANP' OR n.legal_source CONTAINS 'Lei' RETURN n.label AS entidade, n.id AS id, n.type AS tipo, n.legal_source AS base_legal ORDER BY n.type, n.label

question_pt: Quais são os tipos de rocha sedimentar no vocabulário CGI?
question_en: What are the sedimentary rock types in the CGI vocabulary?
cypher: MATCH (n:Geological {id: 'litologia'})-[:has_vocab]->(v) WHERE v.source = 'CGI Simple Lithology' WITH v UNWIND v.concepts AS concept WHERE concept.label_en CONTAINS 'sedimentary rock' RETURN concept.id AS cgi_id, concept.label_pt AS rotulo_pt, concept.label_en AS rotulo_en, concept.parents AS pais ORDER BY concept.label_en

question_pt: Encontre rochas ígneas com equivalente OSDU Limestone no crosswalk CGI-OSDU
question_en: Find igneous rocks with OSDU Limestone equivalent in the CGI-OSDU crosswalk
cypher: MATCH (n:Geological {id: 'litologia'})-[:has_crosswalk]->(xw) WHERE xw.source = 'cgi-osdu-lithology-map' WITH xw UNWIND xw.mappings AS m WHERE m.osdu_value = 'Limestone' RETURN m.cgi_id AS cgi_id, m.cgi_label_en AS cgi_label, m.osdu_value AS osdu_value, m.match_kind AS tipo_mapeamento, m.confidence AS confianca ORDER BY m.match_kind

question_pt: Qual é a definição de calcário no vocabulário internacional CGI?
question_en: What is the definition of limestone in the international CGI vocabulary?
cypher: MATCH (n:Analytical {id: 'litologia'}) RETURN n.label AS entidade, n.definition AS definicao, n.petrokgraph_uri AS uri_kg, n.osdu_kind AS osdu_kind

question_pt: Liste as subclasses de material sedimentar consolidado no CGI
question_en: List subclasses of consolidated sedimentary material in CGI
cypher: MATCH (n:Geological {id: 'litologia'})-[:has_vocab]->(v) WHERE v.source = 'CGI Simple Lithology' WITH v UNWIND v.concepts AS concept WHERE 'consolidated' IN concept.parents OR 'sedimentary_material' IN concept.parents RETURN concept.id AS cgi_id, concept.label_pt AS rotulo_pt, concept.label_en AS rotulo_en, concept.parents AS pais ORDER BY concept.label_en

question_pt: Quais litologias CGI mapeiam para OSDU Sandstone?
question_en: Which CGI lithologies map to OSDU Sandstone?
cypher: MATCH (n:Geological {id: 'litologia'})-[:has_crosswalk]->(xw) WHERE xw.source = 'cgi-osdu-lithology-map' WITH xw UNWIND xw.mappings AS m WHERE m.osdu_value = 'Sandstone' RETURN m.cgi_id AS cgi_id, m.cgi_label_en AS cgi_label_en, m.match_kind AS match_kind, m.confidence AS confianca, m.note AS nota ORDER BY m.match_kind

question_pt: Quais épocas geológicas são relevantes para o pré-sal brasileiro?
question_en: Which geological epochs are relevant to the Brazilian pre-salt?
cypher: MATCH (n:Geological {id: 'idade-geologica'})-[:has_vocab]->(v) WHERE v.source CONTAINS 'ICS' WITH v UNWIND v.units AS u WHERE u.brazil_notes IS NOT NULL AND (u.brazil_notes CONTAINS 'pré-sal' OR u.brazil_notes CONTAINS 'PRÉ-SAL' OR u.brazil_notes CONTAINS 'reservatório') RETURN u.id AS id, u.label_pt AS epoca, u.rank AS rank, u.start_ma AS inicio_ma, u.end_ma AS fim_ma, u.brazil_notes AS contexto_brasil ORDER BY u.start_ma DESC

question_pt: Qual é a duração do período Cretáceo em milhões de anos?
question_en: What is the duration of the Cretaceous period in million years?
cypher: MATCH (n:Geological {id: 'idade-geologica'})-[:has_vocab]->(v) WHERE v.source CONTAINS 'ICS' WITH v UNWIND v.units AS u WHERE u.id = 'cretaceous' RETURN u.label_pt AS periodo, u.rank AS rank, u.start_ma AS inicio_ma, u.end_ma AS fim_ma, (u.start_ma - u.end_ma) AS duracao_ma, u.brazil_notes AS contexto_brasil

question_pt: Liste todos os períodos da Era Mesozoica
question_en: List all periods of the Mesozoic Era
cypher: MATCH (n:Geological {id: 'idade-geologica'})-[:has_vocab]->(v) WHERE v.source CONTAINS 'ICS' WITH v UNWIND v.units AS u WHERE u.parent = 'mesozoic' AND u.rank = 'period' RETURN u.id AS id, u.label_pt AS periodo, u.start_ma AS inicio_ma, u.end_ma AS fim_ma, u.children AS epocas ORDER BY u.start_ma DESC

question_pt: Quando ocorreu o Aptiano e por que é importante para o E&P?
question_en: When did the Aptian occur and why is it important for E&P?
cypher: MATCH (n:Geological {id: 'idade-geologica'})-[:has_vocab]->(v) WHERE v.source CONTAINS 'ICS' WITH v UNWIND v.units AS u WHERE u.id = 'aptian' RETURN u.label_pt AS idade, u.rank AS rank, u.start_ma AS inicio_ma, u.end_ma AS fim_ma, u.parent AS era_pai, u.brazil_notes AS importancia_ep

question_pt: Quais tipos de falha podem ocorrer em bacias de rift?
question_en: Which fault types can occur in rift basins?
cypher: MATCH (f:Geological {id: 'falha'})-[:has_vocab]->(v) WHERE v.source CONTAINS 'CGI' WITH v UNWIND v.concepts AS concept WHERE 'fault' IN concept.parents OR concept.id = 'normal_fault' OR concept.id = 'listric_fault' OR concept.definition CONTAINS 'extensional' RETURN concept.id AS id, concept.label_pt AS tipo_falha, concept.definition AS definicao ORDER BY concept.label_en

question_pt: Qual a diferença entre falha normal e falha reversa segundo o CGI?
question_en: What is the difference between normal fault and reverse fault according to CGI?
cypher: MATCH (f:Geological {id: 'falha'})-[:has_vocab]->(v) WHERE v.source CONTAINS 'CGI' WITH v UNWIND v.concepts AS concept WHERE concept.id IN ['normal_fault', 'reverse_fault'] RETURN concept.id AS id, concept.label_pt AS tipo_falha, concept.label_en AS tipo_falha_en, concept.definition AS definicao, concept.parents AS pais ORDER BY concept.id

question_pt: Quais estilos de deformação estão associados a dobramentos segundo o CGI?
question_en: Which deformation styles are associated with folding according to CGI?
cypher: MATCH (f:Geological {id: 'falha'})-[:has_vocab]->(v) WHERE v.source CONTAINS 'deformation' WITH v UNWIND v.concepts AS concept WHERE concept.id IN ['ductile', 'folded', 'brittle_ductile_transition', 'plastic'] OR concept.label_en CONTAINS 'fold' RETURN concept.id AS id, concept.label_pt AS estilo, concept.definition AS definicao, concept.parents AS pais ORDER BY concept.label_en

question_pt: Liste tipos de contato estratigráfico que representam discordâncias
question_en: List stratigraphic contact types that represent unconformities
cypher: MATCH (f:Geological {id: 'falha'})-[:has_vocab]->(v) WHERE v.source CONTAINS 'contact' WITH v UNWIND v.concepts AS concept WHERE concept.id = 'unconformable_contact' OR 'unconformable_contact' IN concept.parents RETURN concept.id AS id, concept.label_pt AS tipo_contato, concept.label_en AS tipo_contato_en, concept.definition AS definicao, concept.parents AS pais ORDER BY concept.label_en

question_pt: Quais são os componentes de construção de um poço segundo GWML2?
question_en: What are the well construction components according to GWML2?
cypher: MATCH (p:Operational {id: 'poco'})-[:has_standard]->(gwml) WHERE gwml.source CONTAINS 'GWML2' WITH gwml UNWIND gwml.classes AS cls WHERE cls.parent IS NULL OR cls.parent = 'WellConstruction' RETURN cls.id AS classe_gwml2, cls.label_pt AS componente, cls.definition AS definicao, cls.uri AS uri ORDER BY cls.label_pt

question_pt: Encontre poços com diâmetro de revestimento maior que 9.625 polegadas segundo GeoSciML Borehole
question_en: Find wells with casing diameter greater than 9.625 inches according to GeoSciML Borehole
cypher: MATCH (p:Operational {id: 'poco'})-[:has_property]->(prop) WHERE prop.source = 'gsmlbh' AND prop.id = 'boreholeDiameter' RETURN p.label AS poco, p.id AS id, prop.label_pt AS propriedade, prop.unit AS unidade, '> 244.475 mm (9.625 pol)' AS filtro_diametro, prop.uri AS uri_gsmlbh

question_pt: Qual é a situação ANP dos poços abandonados e como mapeia para o OSDU?
question_en: What is the ANP status of abandoned wells and how does it map to OSDU?
cypher: MATCH (p:Operational {id: 'poco'})-[:has_crosswalk]->(xw) WHERE xw.source CONTAINS 'anp-osdu-wellstatus' WITH xw UNWIND xw.mappings AS m WHERE m.anp_label_pt CONTAINS 'bandon' OR m.anp_code IN ['ABANDONADO', 'TAMPONADO', 'SECO'] RETURN m.anp_code AS codigo_anp, m.anp_label_pt AS status_anp, m.osdu_value AS status_osdu, m.match_kind AS tipo_mapeamento, m.notes AS observacao ORDER BY m.anp_code

question_pt: Liste poços perfurados na Formação Barra Velha e sua relação com o pré-sal
question_en: List wells drilled in the Barra Velha Formation and their pre-salt relation
cypher: MATCH (p:Operational {id: 'poco'})-[:penetrates]->(f:Geological {id: 'formacao'}) WHERE f.label CONTAINS 'Barra Velha' OR f.examples CONTAINS 'Barra Velha' WITH p, f MATCH (p)-[:drilled_in]->(b:Operational {id: 'bloco'})-[:delimited_in]->(bs:Operational {id: 'bacia-sedimentar'}) RETURN p.label AS poco, f.label AS formacao, b.label AS bloco, bs.label AS bacia ORDER BY p.label

question_pt: Qual unidade QUDT é usada para medir raio gama em perfis de poço?
question_en: What QUDT unit is used to measure gamma ray in well logs?
cypher: MATCH (pf:Analytical {id: 'perfil-poco'})-[:has_alignment]->(sa) WHERE sa.source CONTAINS 'sosa-qudt' WITH sa UNWIND sa.measurement_alignments AS m WHERE m.mnemonic = 'GR' RETURN m.mnemonic AS mnemonic, m.label_pt AS nome_pt, m.label_en AS nome_en, m.qudt_unit AS unidade_qudt, m.qudt_unit_label AS rotulo_unidade, m.qudt_quantity_kind AS grandeza, m.sosa_class AS classe_sosa, m.witsml_mnemonic AS mnemonic_witsml

question_pt: Quais perfis de poço são modelados como observações SOSA na ontologia?
question_en: Which well logs are modeled as SOSA observations in the ontology?
cypher: MATCH (pf:Analytical {id: 'perfil-poco'})-[:has_alignment]->(sa) WHERE sa.source CONTAINS 'sosa-qudt' WITH sa UNWIND sa.entity_alignments AS ea WHERE ea.sosa_class = 'sosa:Observation' MATCH (n:Analytical) WHERE n.id = ea.entity_id RETURN n.label AS entidade, n.id AS id, ea.sosa_class AS classe_sosa, ea.sosa_sensor AS sensor, ea.rationale AS justificativa ORDER BY n.label

question_pt: Qual a unidade QUDT para pressão de poros e como converter de psi para Pascal?
question_en: What is the QUDT unit for pore pressure and how to convert from psi to Pascal?
cypher: MATCH (fp:Analytical {id: 'formation-pressure-point'})-[:has_alignment]->(sa) WHERE sa.source CONTAINS 'sosa-qudt' WITH sa UNWIND sa.measurement_alignments AS m WHERE m.mnemonic = 'PORE_PRESSURE' RETURN m.mnemonic AS mnemonic, m.label_pt AS nome_pt, m.qudt_unit AS unidade_qudt_si, m.qudt_unit_label AS rotulo_si, m.qudt_quantity_kind AS grandeza, '1 psi = 6894.757 Pa' AS fator_conversao, m.sosa_class AS classe_sosa, m.description AS descricao
